feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Reading comprehension involves distinct cognitive operators for establishing simple and composite discourse referents in a mental model
entry.content:
Authors: S Matar, PM Ortega, M Carreiras

Journal: 2026

Abstract: Reading comprehension involves constructing a cumulative mental model that represents unfolding information. Within this model, the mind establishes discourse referents—entities that can be picked out and referred to, such as 'sponges' and ...

Alert: Manuel Carreiras (author alert)

entry.title: Epigenomic methylome landscape of promoters in vertebrate genomes
entry.content:
Authors: YH Lee, C Lee, ED Jarvis, H Kim

Abstract: Genomic promoters are crucial gene regulatory elements 1, 2. Yet, comparative analyses of promoter architecture have been constrained by the limited resolution of GC-rich regions in short-read-based genome resources 3–6. The Vertebrate ...

Alert: Erich Jarvis (author alert)

entry.title: The reference genome of the Asian Elephant (Elephas maximus): a foundation for conservation and genomic research
entry.content:
Authors: D De Panis, LS Arantes, T Brown, E Somenzi... - BMC Genomics, 2026

Abstract: Background The Asian elephant (Elephas maximus), a keystone species with both ecological and cultural significance, is highly endangered and has disappeared from 95% of its historical range. In this study, we present a chromosome-level assembly ...

Alert: Erich Jarvis (author alert)

entry.title: A Refined Chronology for the Middle‒Upper Paleolithic Transition at Kozarnika Cave (Bulgaria) 40‒50,000 Years Ago: New AMS Radiocarbon Dates and ...
entry.content:
Authors: R HOPKINS, JLUC GUADELLI, D WHITE...

Abstract: The site of Kozarnika in Bulgaria is a key, deep (~ 6m) archaeological sequence spanning the Lower, Middle and Upper Paleolithic of Europe. In its latter phases, it documents the transition from a Neanderthal-dominated Europe to one in which only ...

Alert: Tom Higham (author alert)

entry.title: Integrated information theory: the good, the bad and the misunderstood
entry.content:
Authors: AB Barrett, B Milinkovic, PAM Mediano, FE Rosas... - arXiv preprint arXiv ..., 2026

Abstract: The integrated information theory of consciousness (IIT) is uniquely ambitious in proposing a mathematical formula, derived from apparently fundamental properties of conscious experience, to describe the quantity and quality of consciousness for ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Consciousness, Reviewer, too: Complexity

Alert: Anil Seth (author alert)

entry.title: Integrated information theory: the good, the bad and the misunderstood
entry.content:
Authors: AB Barrett, B Milinkovic, PAM Mediano, FE Rosas... - arXiv preprint arXiv ..., 2026

Abstract: The integrated information theory of consciousness (IIT) is uniquely ambitious in proposing a mathematical formula, derived from apparently fundamental properties of conscious experience, to describe the quantity and quality of consciousness for ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Consciousness, Reviewer, too: Complexity

Alert: Fernando E. Rosas (author alert)

entry.title: A Little Rank Goes a Long Way: Random Scaffolds with LoRA Adapters Are All You Need
entry.content:
Authors: H Hazan, Y Zhang, B Hartl, M Levin - arXiv preprint arXiv:2604.08749, 2026

Abstract: How many of a neural network's parameters actually encode task-specific information? We investigate this question with LottaLoRA, a training paradigm in which every backbone weight is drawn at random and frozen; only low-rank LoRA ...

Alert: Michael Levin (author alert)

entry.title: Spectroscopic Characterization of WD J000801. 25-350450 and its Two Co-Moving Companions
entry.content:
Authors: TP Bickle, JD Kirkpatrick, SL Casewell, NG Fusillo... - arXiv preprint arXiv ..., 2026

Abstract: We present new spectroscopic data for Gaia DR3 2309499817384726016 (WD0008- 350A) and its two wide, co-moving, low-mass companions. We confirm the white dwarf is a hydrogen-rich DA, with T $ _ {\rm eff} $= 6200$\pm $90~ K and a mass of ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: Adam J. Burgasser (author alert)

entry.title: No Coincidence, George: Capacity Limits in Cognitive Processing Reflect the Curse of Generalization
entry.content:
Authors: SM Frankland, R Marjieh, M Nurisso, J Fluegemann...

Journal: 2026

Abstract: The striking constraints of some human cognitive processes stand in stark contrast to the nearlimitless capability of others. While we can acquire and flexibly use vast amounts ofinformation, the amount we can process at any one time is often stiflingly ...

Alert: Giovanni Petri (author alert)

entry.title: Coronal dimmings from active region 13664 during the May 2024 solar energetic events (Corrigendum)
entry.content:
Authors: A Razquin, AM Veronig, K Dissauer, T Podladchikova... - Astronomy & Astrophysics, 2026

Abstract: This corrigendum to Razquin et al.(2025) corrects an inconsistency in the comparison between the total unsigned magnetic flux of the May 2024 events' coronal dimmings and that of the general dimming population reported by Dissauer ...

Alert: Astrid Veronig (author alert)
